module_info.docstring:
Configuration management for GPT Researcher.

This module provides the Config class that manages all configuration
settings for GPT Researcher including LLM providers, embeddings,
retrievers, and various operational parameters.

classes.name: Config
classes.docstring:
Configuration manager for GPT Researcher.

Handles loading, parsing, and managing all configuration settings
from files, environment variables, and defaults.

Attributes:
    CONFIG_DIR: Directory containing configuration files.
    config_path: Path to the configuration file.
    llm_kwargs: Additional keyword arguments for LLM.
    embedding_kwargs: Additional keyword arguments for embeddings.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize the config class.

Args:
    config_path: Optional path to a JSON configuration file.

methods.name: _set_attributes
methods.docstring:
Set configuration attributes from config dictionary.

Merges environment variables with config file values, with
environment variables taking precedence.

Args:
    config: Dictionary of configuration key-value pairs.

methods.name: _set_embedding_attributes
methods.docstring: Parse and set embedding provider and model attributes.

methods.name: _set_llm_attributes
methods.docstring: Parse and set LLM provider and model attributes for all LLM types.

methods.name: _handle_deprecated_attributes
methods.docstring: Handle deprecated configuration attributes with warnings.

methods.name: parse_retrievers
methods.docstring: Parse the retriever string into a list of retrievers and validate them.

methods.name: validate_doc_path
methods.docstring: Ensure that the folder exists at the doc path

methods.name: convert_env_value
methods.docstring: Convert environment variable to the appropriate type based on the type hint.

methods.name: get_mcp_server_config
methods.docstring:
Get the configuration for an MCP server.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the MCP server to get the config for.
        
Returns:
    dict: The server configuration, or an empty dict if the server is not found.
